strengths: Active hands-on AI and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and AI-agent infrastructure, directly relevant to the role's AI builder requirement

Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, built open-source platforms (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and delivered production systems at early-stage startups across multiple continents
Exceptional technical breadth spanning embedded systems, high-throughput microservices, mobile, GIS, and cloud-adjacent tooling, with ~17 years of continuous professional software delivery
concerns: No graduate-level AI/ML credentials and AI work is recent and narrow — lacks the depth in ML systems, model architecture, or AI platform strategy that the preferred qualifications and advisory responsibilities demand

Career title trajectory (Senior/Staff Developer) sits well below the Director-level IC seniority this role requires; no evidence of cross-organizational technical leadership, executive advisory relationships, or setting engineering strategy at scale

Cloud expertise is thin — no meaningful AWS, GCP, or Azure platform architecture ownership, and no history advising strategic customers or partners on cloud adoption, which are core day-to-day responsibilities
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable, broadly skilled engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and recent entry into AI-agent tooling, but the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor who can shape cloud and AI strategy at an organizational scale, advise enterprise customers, and operate as a recognized external authority in AI — a profile that requires both deeper AI/ML expertise and a significantly more senior leadership track record than the resume demonstrates.
